scripts.dev: npm run prepare:prisma && prisma generate && next dev
scripts.build: npm run prepare:prisma && prisma generate && prisma db push --skip-generate && next build
scripts.prisma:migrate: npm run prepare:prisma && prisma migrate dev --name init
scripts.seed: npm run prepare:prisma && prisma generate && tsx -r tsconfig-paths/register prisma/seed.ts
scripts.setup: test -f .env || cp .env.example .env; npm install && npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run seed
